verdict_summary: V7-H UUID fallback verified — Korean APF warning rendered in answer area, RRN decode absent, no regression from V7-G #771 baseline.

evidence.warning_text_quote: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

recommendation: DONE — perplexity REMAINS DONE. V7-H UUID fallback successfully replaces REQUEST_BODY:frontend_context_uuid macros without breaking anonymous-session warning routing.
notes: Identical outcome to V7-G #771 (Korean warning + RRN absent + same SSE FETCHER_SSE_NO_STATUS_CODE_ERROR pattern). Anonymous session, fresh hard-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), DevTools Console open during submit. URL transitioned to /search/{uuid} confirming SPA routing intact. main element innerText contains warning + SSE-disconnect notice only; structural regex check confirms zero RRN tokens and zero decode-keywords (남자/여자/1988년/생년월일/성별/주민등록번호/태어났/출생) in answer area. The 880101-1234567 in body.innerText matches only the sidebar history link (collapsed prompt echo), not a model decode. Length 1171→1136 bytes change had no negative effect.
